title: 2026 Destination Management Company (DMC) Platform Deep Review: Global DMC vs Kuoni vs TUI Comprehensive Comparison
description: Deep review of 2026 mainstream destination management company (DMC) platforms, including Global DMC, Kuoni, TUI three platforms feature comparison, local service capability, supplier management analysis, helping travel agencies and DMCs optimize destination services. Learn more about features and pricing comparison, find the best solution for you! Professional review helps you make decisions!
content:
Destination Management Company (DMC) Platform: Digital Engine for Destination Services

Destination Management Company (DMC) platforms are core tools for destination services, covering four modules: local service management, supplier management, itinerary planning, and customer management. In 2026, destination management upgraded from manual records to digital platforms, with online local service management, digital supplier management, and visual itinerary planning becoming three major trends. Traditional DMC management relied on manual records, phone communication, and Excel spreadsheets, resulting in low efficiency, easy errors, and difficult tracking. Digital DMC platforms solve these pain points through online management, digital suppliers, and visual planning, improving destination service efficiency and quality. This article deeply reviews three mainstream DMC platforms: Global DMC, Kuoni, and TUI, providing decision basis for destination management.

Core Review Platform Introduction

Global DMC: Global DMC Network Platform

Global DMC was established in 2010, headquartered in London, and is a global DMC network platform. It serves 500+ DMC clients worldwide, covering Europe, Asia, Americas, Africa global destinations. Global DMC's core advantage lies in global DMC network, with global DMC network connection, global DMC supplier sharing, and global DMC service standards. Travel agencies can connect to global DMCs through Global DMC's global network and obtain global destination services. Global DMC is particularly suitable for travel agencies with global destination needs, with complete global DMC network improving global service capability.

Kuoni: European High-end DMC Platform

Kuoni was established in 1906, headquartered in Zurich, and is a European high-end DMC platform. It serves global high-end travelers, covering Europe, Asia, Africa high-end destinations. Kuoni's core advantage lies in high-end service depth, with high-end local services, high-end supplier management, and high-end itinerary planning. High-end travel agencies can provide high-end destination services through Kuoni's high-end services and improve high-end guest satisfaction. Kuoni is particularly suitable for travel agencies with high-end destination needs, with complete high-end services improving high-end guest experience.

TUI: European Mass Tourism Platform

TUI was established in 1923, headquartered in Hanover, and is a European mass tourism platform. It serves millions of travelers worldwide, covering Europe, Mediterranean mass destinations. TUI's core advantage lies in mass service breadth, with mass local services, mass supplier network, and mass itinerary planning. Mass travel agencies can provide mass destination services through TUI's mass services and improve mass guest satisfaction. TUI is particularly suitable for travel agencies with mass destination needs, with complete mass services improving mass guest experience.

Local Service Management Capability

Local Activity Services

Local activity services are DMC's core function, including local attraction services, local activity services, and local experience services. Global DMC local activity services are most complete, with local attraction services (attraction tickets, attraction guides), local activity services (cultural activities, sports activities), and local experience services (food experiences, cultural experiences). Travel agencies can provide local activities through Global DMC local activity services and improve guest experience. Kuoni local activity services are high-end oriented, with high-end local activities. TUI local activity services are mass oriented, with mass local activities.

Local Transportation Services

Local transportation services are DMC's key function, including local car rental services, local pickup services, and local guide transportation. Global DMC local transportation services are most complete, with local car rental services (car rental booking), local pickup services (airport pickup, hotel pickup), and local guide transportation (guide transportation arrangement). Travel agencies can provide local transportation through Global DMC local transportation services and improve guest convenience. Kuoni local transportation services are high-end oriented, with high-end transportation services. TUI local transportation services are mass oriented, with mass transportation services.

Local Dining Services

Local dining services are DMC's supplementary function, including local restaurant booking, local food experiences, and local dining recommendations. Global DMC local dining services are most complete, with local restaurant booking, local food experiences, and local dining recommendations. Travel agencies can provide local dining through Global DMC local dining services and improve guest food experience. Kuoni local dining services are high-end oriented, with high-end dining services. TUI local dining services are mass oriented, with mass dining services.

Local Guide Services

Local guide services are DMC's core function, including local guide booking, local guide language, and local guide professionalism. Global DMC local guide services are most complete, with local guide booking (guide booking), local guide language (multilingual guides), and local guide professionalism (professional guides). Travel agencies can provide local guides through Global DMC local guide services and improve guest experience. Kuoni local guide services are high-end oriented, with high-end guide services. TUI local guide services are mass oriented, with mass guide services.

Supplier Management Capability

Supplier Network

Supplier network is DMC's key function, including local supplier network, global supplier network, and supplier classification. Global DMC supplier network is most complete, with local supplier network (local hotels, local restaurants, local activities), global supplier network (global hotels, global restaurants, global activities), and supplier classification (hotel suppliers, restaurant suppliers, activity suppliers). Travel agencies can access global suppliers through Global DMC supplier network and improve supplier selection. Kuoni supplier network is high-end oriented, with high-end supplier network. TUI supplier network is mass oriented, with mass supplier network.

Supplier Evaluation

Supplier evaluation is DMC's management function, including supplier quality evaluation, supplier service evaluation, and supplier price evaluation. Global DMC supplier evaluation is most complete, with supplier quality evaluation (service quality scoring), supplier service evaluation (service response time), and supplier price evaluation (price competitiveness). Travel agencies can evaluate suppliers through Global DMC supplier evaluation and optimize supplier selection. Kuoni supplier evaluation is high-end oriented, with high-end supplier evaluation. TUI supplier evaluation is mass oriented, with mass supplier evaluation.

Supplier Contract Management

Supplier contract management is DMC's management function, including supplier contracts, supplier pricing, and supplier settlement. Global DMC supplier contract management is most complete, with supplier contract management (contract storage), supplier price management (price agreements), and supplier settlement management (settlement process). Travel agencies can manage supplier contracts through Global DMC supplier contract management and optimize supplier settlement. Kuoni supplier contract management is high-end oriented, with high-end supplier contracts. TUI supplier contract management is mass oriented, with mass supplier contracts.

Supplier Settlement Management

Supplier settlement management is DMC's key function, including supplier settlement, supplier invoices, and supplier payments. Global DMC supplier settlement management is most complete, with supplier settlement (settlement calculation), supplier invoices (invoice issuance), and supplier payments (payment process). Travel agencies can manage supplier settlement through Global DMC supplier settlement management and improve settlement efficiency. Kuoni supplier settlement management is high-end oriented, with high-end supplier settlement. TUI supplier settlement management is mass oriented, with mass supplier settlement.

Itinerary Planning Capability

Itinerary Planning Tools

Itinerary planning tools are DMC's core function, including itinerary planning, itinerary management, and itinerary collaboration. Global DMC itinerary planning tools are most complete, with itinerary planning (itinerary creation), itinerary management (itinerary modification), and itinerary collaboration (itinerary collaboration). Travel agencies can plan itineraries through Global DMC itinerary planning tools and improve itinerary efficiency. Kuoni itinerary planning tools are high-end oriented, with high-end itinerary planning. TUI itinerary planning tools are mass oriented, with mass itinerary planning.

Itinerary Visual Management

Itinerary visual management is DMC's key function, including itinerary timeline, itinerary map, and itinerary calendar. Global DMC itinerary visual management is most complete, with itinerary timeline (timeline display itinerary), itinerary map (map display itinerary), and itinerary calendar (calendar display itinerary). Travel agencies can intuitively manage itineraries through Global DMC itinerary visual management. Kuoni itinerary visual management is high-end oriented, with high-end itinerary visualization. TUI itinerary visual management is mass oriented, with mass itinerary visualization.

Itinerary Template Library

Itinerary template library is DMC's supplementary function, including itinerary templates, itinerary reuse, and itinerary customization. Global DMC itinerary template library is most complete, with itinerary template library (global itinerary templates), itinerary reuse (template reuse), and itinerary customization (template customization). Travel agencies can reuse itinerary templates through Global DMC itinerary template library and improve itinerary efficiency. Kuoni itinerary template library is high-end oriented, with high-end itinerary templates. TUI itinerary template library is mass oriented, with mass itinerary templates.

Customer Management Capability

Customer CRM

Customer CRM is DMC's management function, including customer information, customer preferences, and customer history. Global DMC customer CRM is most complete, with customer information (customer profiles), customer preferences (preference records), and customer history (historical itineraries). Travel agencies can manage customer information through Global DMC customer CRM and improve customer service. Kuoni customer CRM is high-end oriented, with high-end customer CRM. TUI customer CRM is mass oriented, with mass customer CRM.

Customer Communication Management

Customer communication management is DMC's key function, including customer email communication, customer phone communication, and customer app communication. Global DMC customer communication management is most complete, with customer email communication (email communication), customer phone communication (phone communication), and customer app communication (app communication). Travel agencies can manage customer communication through Global DMC customer communication management and improve communication efficiency. Kuoni customer communication management is high-end oriented, with high-end customer communication. TUI customer communication management is mass oriented, with mass customer communication.

Customer Feedback Collection

Customer feedback collection is DMC's management function, including customer satisfaction scoring, customer feedback comments, and customer feedback analysis. Global DMC customer feedback collection is most complete, with customer satisfaction scoring (score collection), customer feedback comments (comment collection), and customer feedback analysis (feedback analysis). Travel agencies can collect customer feedback through Global DMC customer feedback collection and improve service quality. Kuoni customer feedback collection is high-end oriented, with high-end customer feedback. TUI customer feedback collection is mass oriented, with mass customer feedback.

Application Scenario Recommendations

Global Destination DMC

Global destination DMC recommends Global DMC. Its global DMC network depth, complete local services, and complete supplier management match global destination needs. Global DMC needs to connect to global DMC networks and provide global destination services. Global DMC's complete global DMC network improves global service capability. Global DMC's complete local services improve local service quality.

High-end Destination DMC

High-end destination DMC recommends Kuoni. Its high-end service depth, high-end supplier network, and high-end itinerary planning match high-end destination needs. High-end DMC needs to provide high-end destination services and meet high-end guest requirements. Kuoni's complete high-end services improve high-end guest satisfaction. Kuoni's complete high-end itinerary planning improves high-end itinerary experience.

Mass Destination DMC

Mass destination DMC recommends TUI. Its mass service breadth, mass supplier network, and mass itinerary planning match mass destination needs. Mass DMC needs to provide mass destination services and meet mass guest needs. TUI's complete mass services improve mass guest satisfaction. TUI has flexible pricing that mass guests can afford.

2026 DMC Development Trends

Local Service AI Recommendations

Local service AI recommendations upgrade from manual selection to AI recommendations, with AI recommending local activities, local restaurants, and local guides based on guest preferences. By 2027, 40% of DMC platforms are expected to integrate AI recommendations. Global DMC has already begun AI recommendation experiments.

Supplier Management Intelligence

Supplier management upgrades from manual management to intelligent management, with AI evaluating suppliers, AI recommending suppliers, and AI optimizing supplier prices. By 2026, 50% of DMC platforms are expected to achieve intelligent supplier management. Global DMC supplier evaluation leads.

Itinerary Planning Automation

Itinerary planning upgrades from manual planning to automated planning, with AI generating itineraries, AI optimizing itinerary time, and AI recommending itinerary activities. By 2027, 40% of DMC platforms are expected to achieve automated itinerary planning. Global DMC itinerary planning leads.

Customer Service Digitalization

Customer service upgrades from phone service to digital service, with customer app services, customer online services, and customer self-services. By 2026, 60% of DMC platforms are expected to achieve digital customer service. Global DMC customer communication management leads.

Selection Recommendation Summary

DMC platform selection requires comprehensive consideration of three dimensions: destination scope, service level, and customer type. Global destination DMCs should prioritize Global DMC, with deep global DMC network and complete local services. High-end destination DMCs should prioritize Kuoni, with deep high-end services and complete high-end supplier network. Mass destination DMCs should prioritize TUI, with broad mass services and complete mass itinerary planning. Local service AI recommendations, supplier management intelligence, itinerary planning automation, and customer service digitalization are four major trends in 2026. Selection should focus on platform layouts in these directions.
author: DMCTech Expert
